tasks.label: Git init and push master
tasks.command: set -e && cd /home/mudit-loya/Documents/Projects/om-atharva-industries && (git init -b master || git init) && git branch -M master && if git remote get-url origin >/dev/null 2>&1; then git remote set-url origin git@github.com:mudit-loya/om-atharva-industries.git; else git remote add origin git@github.com:mudit-loya/om-atharva-industries.git; fi && find . -type f \( -name '.DS_Store' -o -name 'Thumbs.db' \) -delete && git add . && if git diff --cached --quiet; then echo 'NO_CHANGES_TO_COMMIT'; else git commit -m "Initial commit"; fi && git push -u origin master
